ops.title: RealHome: appex sandbox container vs real home
ops.body: Inside an app extension (appex), `NSHomeDirectory()` and `FileManager.homeDirectoryForCurrentUser` return the sandbox CONTAINER path, not the user's home. RealHome reads the passwd database via `getpwuid(getuid())`, which yields the true home regardless of container redirection — that is the reason the type exists. It falls back to homeDirectoryForCurrentUser only when the passwd lookup yields no usable path.
